nasb.text: In this manner Absalom dealt with all Israel who came to the king for judgment; so Absalom stole away the hearts of the men of Israel.

esv.text: Thus Absalom did to all of Israel who came to the king for judgment. So Absalom stole the hearts of the men of Israel.

cnv.text: 所有來到王面前請求審決的以色列人，押沙龍都是這樣對待他們。因此，押沙龍暗中迷惑了以色列人的心。

ccb.text: 押沙龙这样对待每一个来向王申诉的以色列人，赢得了民心。
